attributes.Sql Query:
/***************************
   SELECT    
    POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY       AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.PRODUCT_KEY        AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_KEY  ,
   COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
     CASE    WHEN POS_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG = 'Y' THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER) 
             ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY, CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))    
     END AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME       AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER       AS SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,
   POS_DETAIL.PROCESS_DATE        AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
   COALESCE(POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))  AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT  ,
   'POS'           AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE        AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE       AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
   'UNKNOWN'          AS IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.ADJUSTMENT_CODE         AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE  ,
   'POS'           AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   'N'           AS CANCELLED_FLG  ,
     '='           AS CANCEL_CODE   ,
   'N'           AS ACQUISITION_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG       AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG     AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS OVERLAY_FLG  ,
   'Y'           AS IC_REVENUE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS CHARGES_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS SALESREP_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS MISC_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG       AS SERVICE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG  ,
   'Y'           AS REVENUE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS RMA_FLG  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS TRADE_IN_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT         AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT      AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT      AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT  ,
   CAST(POS_DETAIL.ADJUSTMENT_QTY  AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY /* Modified as part of True Demand Bookings definition * ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  ,
   COALESCE(POS_TRANS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ,
   CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))   AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  ,
   USER           AS EDW_CREATE_USER  ,
   USER           AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  ,
   1            AS CONVERSION_RT   ,
   NULL          AS CONVERSION_DT   ,
   NULL          AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  ,
   NULL          AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM   ,
   NULL          AS DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE   ,
   NULL          AS DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD   ,
   'USD'          AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD    ,
   'POS'          AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE   ,
   MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY       AS ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY  ,
   'I'           AS ACTION_CODE  ,
   'I'           AS DML_TYPE  ,
   NULL          AS DV_TRANSACTION_NAME  /**R9** ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   AS  BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT   /**R9**    ,
   DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG       /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*      ,
   DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG           /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*    ,
   /* Updated the below columns derivation as part of Q2FY15
   CASE WHEN CUST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT IS NOT NULL  THEN 'BUNDLE' ELSE 'STANDALONE' END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   POS_DETAIL.PRODUCT_KEY      AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)      AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)      AS SK_OFFER_ATTRBUTION_ID_INT    *
     POS_DETAIL.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     POS_DETAIL.TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
     CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                    AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
     POS_DETAIL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS POS_DETAIL 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRANS 
    ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRANS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   /* Removed below left join as part of  Q2FY15 OFFER ATTRIBUTION 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
    SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM 
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRX_LINE_OFFER_ATRBTN  
    GROUP BY 1 ) CUST
   ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=CUST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT *
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION MAD  
    ON POS_DETAIL.DESCRIPTION = MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR
   WHERE  POS_DETAIL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'                    *************************************/ 
   
   /*Commented as part of  Q1FY15- DSV*/
   
     SELECT    
   POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY       AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.PRODUCT_KEY        AS PRODUCT_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.TRANSACTION_DTM       AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BK_SALES_REP_NUM       AS SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT        AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT  ,
   'POS'           AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_CHANNEL_CD        AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
   'UNKNOWN'          AS IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE  ,
   POS_DETAIL.ADJUSTMENT_CD         AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE  ,
   'POS'           AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
   'N'           AS CANCELLED_FLG  ,
   '='           AS CANCEL_CODE   ,
   'N'           AS ACQUISITION_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG       AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG     AS CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS OVERLAY_FLG  ,
   'Y'           AS IC_REVENUE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS CHARGES_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS SALESREP_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS MISC_FLG  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SERVICE_FLG       AS SERVICE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG  ,
   'Y'           AS REVENUE_FLG  ,
   'N'           AS RMA_FLG  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS TRADE_IN_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT         AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT      AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT      AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT  ,
   CAST(POS_DETAIL.DD_EXTENDED_QTY  AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY   ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT  ,
   CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_USD_AMT  AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  ,
   POS_DETAIL.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT  ,
   USER           AS EDW_CREATE_USER  ,
   USER           AS EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)        AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  ,
   /*1            AS CONVERSION_RT   ,*/ /* Modified as part of SFP FY22Q1 Rel */
   
   CASE WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD= 'DSV_BKG' AND NBTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE >= '2020-07-26' THEN COALESCE(NBTL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,1.00000000000)
        WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='POS' AND NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE >= '2020-07-26' THEN COALESCE(NPTL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,1.00000000000)
   ELSE 1.00000000000 END AS CONVERSION_RT,
   
   NULL          AS CONVERSION_DT   ,
   NULL          AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  ,
   NULL          AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM   ,
   NULL          AS DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE   ,
   NULL          AS DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD   ,
   /*'USD'          AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD    ,*/  /* Modified as part of SFP FY22Q1 Rel */
   
   CASE WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD= 'DSV_BKG' AND NBTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE >= '2020-07-26' THEN COALESCE(NBTL.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'USD')
        WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='POS' AND NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE >= '2020-07-26' THEN COALESCE(NPTL.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'USD')
   ELSE 'USD'  END AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
   
   'POS'          AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE   ,
   MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY       AS ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY  ,
   'I'           AS ACTION_CODE  ,
   'I'           AS DML_TYPE  ,
   NULL          AS DV_TRANSACTION_NAME  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   AS  BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT      ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG       ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG            ,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   POS_DETAIL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
   CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                    AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
   POS_DETAIL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   
   CASE WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD= 'DSV_BKG' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='POS' THEN 'N'
   ELSE 'N' END AS DSV_FLAG,
   
   CASE WHEN  POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='DSV_BKG' THEN POS_DETAIL.BK_TOP_BKGS_POS_TRX_ID_INT
   WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD ='POS' OR POS_DETAIL.POS_RETURN_ROLE='Y'THEN POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   ELSE DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 
   END DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT
   ,CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
   ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
   ,COALESCE(NPTL.BK_DEAL_ID, NBTL.BK_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS DV_DEAL_ID  /*added for DEAL_ID*/  
   ,POS_DETAIL.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY
   ,POS_DETAIL.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMT
   ,POS_DETAIL.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMT
   ,POS_DETAIL.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,POS_DETAIL.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,POS_DETAIL.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
,POS_DETAIL.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT    
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(27,7))DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT 
 /* Q1FY18 PA */
 ,POS_DETAIL.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
  ,POS_DETAIL.POB_TYPE_CD
  ,POS_DETAIL.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
  ,POS_DETAIL.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
 , -999 AS SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
 ,POS_DETAIL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT/*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM POS ENHANCEMENT -SVAKULAB*/
,POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD AS SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,CASE WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='POS' THEN cast (NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE  as TIMESTAMP(0))
WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='DSV_BKG' THEN NULL
END DV_INV_DTM 
,CASE WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='POS' THEN cast (NPTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE  as TIMESTAMP(0))
WHEN POS_DETAIL.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD='DSV_BKG' THEN CAST (NBTL.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0))
END DV_COMPENSATION_DTM    
,0.000 AS DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
,POS_DETAIL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,POS_DETAIL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,POS_DETAIL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,'UNK' AS DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,POS_DETAIL.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME /*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,POS_DETAIL.LINKED_ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_POS_TRX POS_DETAIL 
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION MAD  
   ON POS_DETAIL.DESCRIPTION = MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR
   
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR CAL  /*added this join to derive new column quarter number*/
   ON POS_DETAIL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT=CAL.CALENDAR_DATE
   /*added for DEAL_ID*/
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
   ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   
   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NBTL
   ON POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NBTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   /*END-DEAL_ID*/  
    
   WHERE  POS_DETAIL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'

SELECT
 BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
 BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
 BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
 BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
 BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
 BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
 BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
 BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
 BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
 BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
 BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
 BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
 BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
 BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
 BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
 BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
 BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
 BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
 BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
 BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                      ,
 BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
 BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
 BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
 BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                       ,
 BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
 BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)         AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
 BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
 BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
 BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
 BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
 BKG_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
 BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
 BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
 BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
 BKG_TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
 BKG_TRX.DSV_FLG                       ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
 BKG_TRX.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
 BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
 BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
 BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
 BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY        ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT       ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT         ,
 BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT           
 ,BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG
      ,BKG_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
      ,BKG_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
   ,BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG
,BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
,BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT    
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18*/ 
 ,BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD 
         ,  '=' AS     ACTION_CODE,
           '=' AS     DML_TYPE
,BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */	
,BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM
,BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM	
,BKG_TRX.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION   
,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,'UNK' AS DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
        FROM 
      $$STGDB.WI_OFFER_TYPE_RETRO_POS BKG_TRX
     WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 
  FROM $$WORKDB.W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE WBM
  WHERE WBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND 
  WBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
  WBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)

SELECT  BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
            BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
            BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
            BKG_TRX.
            END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
            BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
            BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
            BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
            BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
            BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
            BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
            BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
            BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
            BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
            BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
            BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
            BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
            BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
            BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
            BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
            BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
            BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
            BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
            BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
            BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
            BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
            BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                      ,
            BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
            BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
            BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
            BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
            BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                       ,
            BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
            BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
            BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
            BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
            BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
            BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
            BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
            BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
            BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
            BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
            BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
            BKG_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
            BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
            BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
            BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
            BKG_TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
            BKG_TRX.DSV_FLG                       ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
            BKG_TRX.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
            BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
            BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
            BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
            BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY        ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT       ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT         ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT             ,
            CASE 
                WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG 
                ELSE     COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,
            'N' ) 
            END ,
            BKG_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,
            BKG_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG ,
            BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT  ,
            BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT      ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT  ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT  ,
            BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT ,
            BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT ,
            BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
			BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE,
			BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM,
			BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
			,BKG_TRX.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
			,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
    FROM            $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX        
    INNER JOIN                     (                
        SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
        FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR               
        WHERE   1=1                 
            AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (
            SELECT  
                    CASE 
                        WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 
                        ELSE 3 
                    END 
            FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  
            WHERE   FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )                
            and FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >=0                ) CAL               
        ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  
    INNER JOIN          
    ( 
SEL SALES_ORDER_KEY,  XCAT_FLG  
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV 
    WHERE END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
    AND EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= (
        SELECT  LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
        FROM    $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
        WHERE   JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS' 
            AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS') 
            GROUP BY 1,2
    ) NSO 
        ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
/*      AND NSO.
            END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
    
INNER JOIN     
( SEL ITEM_KEY,XCAT_FLG,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP,
     (SEL PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
 GROUP BY 1)BKG_TRX
     WHERE BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
     GROUP BY 1,2,3
     ) NP          
        ON BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY 
   

 WHERE   BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' 

/*      AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= (
        SELECT  LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
        FROM    $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
        WHERE   JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS' 
            AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS') */
        AND BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG <> (
            CASE 
                WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG 
                ELSE  COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,
            'N' ) 
            END) 
    UNION  
	SELECT
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                      ,
BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                       ,
BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        ,
BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   ,
BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
BKG_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
BKG_TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
BKG_TRX.DSV_FLG                       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
BKG_TRX.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY        ,
BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT         ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT           
/*ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT: RELEASE -Q3FY17 */
,CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE     COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N' ) END
,BKG_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,BKG_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
,BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG
,BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
,BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
,BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM
,BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,BKG_TRX.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
FROM 
       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
       INNER JOIN
				       (
				SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
				WHERE 1=1
				AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT CASE WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )
				and FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >=0
				) CAL
				ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 INNER JOIN 
        $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 



INNER JOIN
       ( SEL ITEM_KEY,XCAT_FLG,EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP,
     (SEL PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX 
WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
 GROUP BY 1)BKG_TRX
     WHERE BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
     GROUP BY 1,2,3
     )NP        
 ON BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY				
/* Code Modfided as part of Perf Recommendations */

WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND NP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= (
SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS'
AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS')
AND BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG <> (
CASE 
WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG 
ELSE  COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,
'N' ) END)

SELECT
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                      ,
BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                       ,
BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        ,
BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY          ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   ,
BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY     ,
BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ,
BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,
BKG_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FMV_FLG                    ,
BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
BKG_TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
BKG_TRX.DSV_FLG                       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
BKG_TRX.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            ,
BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY        ,
BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT       ,
BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT         ,
BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT           
/*ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT: RELEASE -Q3FY17 */
,BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG  AS XCAT_FLG
,PMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,PMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
/*CHANGED AS PART 0F MAR 16 RELEASE -Q3FY17 */
 ------,PMAP.ELA_FLG
 , CASE    WHEN BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE PMAP.ELA_FLG  END AS ELA_FLG 
,BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
,BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
 ,BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
,BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD 
,BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
,BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
,BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
,BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM
,BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,BKG_TRX.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/*Epic 6200 Sept 2025 release */
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
FROM 
       $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
       INNER JOIN
				       (
				SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
				WHERE 1=1
				AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND (SELECT CASE WHEN FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT =1 THEN 4 ELSE 3 END FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_AGE=0 )
				and FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >=0
				) CAL
				ON BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN
				$$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP PMAP
     ON PMAP.PRODUCT_KEY            = BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY
 AND   PMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY            = BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND PMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  
 WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND PMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
		WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS'
			AND TABLE_NAME ='W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_POS')
AND  NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OFFER_TYPE_RETRO_POS WI
 WHERE WI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND 
 WI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
 WI.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE =BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)
   AND 
 (
 BKG_TRX.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <> PMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 OR
BKG_TRX.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> PMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
OR
/*CHANGED AS PART 0F MAR 16 RELEASE -Q3FY17 */
 -----BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG <>  PMAP.ELA_FLG
 BKG_TRX.ELA_FLG <> (CASE    WHEN BKG_TRX.XCAT_FLG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y'  ELSE PMAP.ELA_FLG END) 

)
AND 1=2
